enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Thaniye Thananthaniye'?

The song expresses feelings of solitude and longing, reflecting on the emotional turmoil of love.

What is the context of this song in the movie Rhythm?

In Rhythm, the song captures the protagonist's introspective moments, highlighting their emotional struggles.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Shankar Mahadevan and composed by AR Rahman.

When was 'Thaniye Thananthaniye' released?

The song was released on September 15, 2000.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thaniye Thananthaniye, the protagonist reflects on their feelings of isolation and yearning for love. The song's soothing melody, crafted by AR Rahman, complements Shankar Mahadevan's heartfelt vocals, creating an emotional experience. It beautifully conveys the complexities of love and longing, making it a timeless classic. The poignant lyrics by Vairamuthu further enhance the song's depth, resonating with anyone who has faced heartache.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thaniye Thananthaniye is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of solitude and longing. With Shankar Mahadevan's soulful voice and AR Rahman's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced love and loss. Dive into the emotional depths of this classic from Rhythm and let its soothing vibes transport you.
stanzaMeanings: I am standing alone, waiting for you. Oh sky, I will let go of your pride.
In the month of October, I was enjoying the rain in the sky.
At that time, there was no one around, only she came to enjoy the sky.
We looked at each other and changed our lives.
In the heart of a tiger called taste, we found a connection.
I too, under the moonlight, let the milk rain fall down..
I am standing alone, waiting for you. Oh sky, I will let go of your pride.
Unfamiliar name, unfamiliar name, unfamiliar name..
If I think of my shadow and another's continuation as a mistake,
If a little bird in jeans says hello and smiles, it melts my heart.
If that stone separates, I am left melting in life.
Because of a small reason, if I disappear,
I believe she will come back, I know the way she will come back.
I am standing alone, waiting for you. Oh sky, I will let go of your pride.
Unfamiliar name, unfamiliar name, unfamiliar name ...
